creator: vallentin@icir.org
text:
Created attachment 168273
caf-0.14.5_1.diff

Bugfixes:

- message_handler no longer accidentally accepts timeouts (e46ef38)
- Fix issues with combining behaviors using or_else (35c558a)
- Fix exception handling in blocking actors (564001b)

Improvements:

- Improved stealing behavior of workers (34e25fa)
- Typed handles can be combined with extend_with (5a624bf)
